title: GO Pen Pen
wikitext:
[]: GO! Pen Pen!             Quote Post by Tsuki No Nagisa » Thu Jan 26, 2012 6:13 pm well...i was bored... So let's talk about the Magnificent Pen Pen, i mean, that penguin's my Fav Character! correct that, my fav chara is Kaworu Nagisa. As i don't know...here! some Fan-arts of Pen Pen. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Thu Jan 26, 2012 9:43 pm Bout time Pen-Pen got his own thread. The deepest character in Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by ONIAgent150 » Thu Jan 26, 2012 10:47 pm Imagine Pen-Pen as a mouthpiece for Anno, then rewatch Evangelion . Mind=blown.

[]:             Quote Post by Aiko Heiwa » Thu Jan 26, 2012 11:34 pm I seriously think Pen Pen is my favourite character.

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Fri Jan 27, 2012 12:20 am Pen Pen is almost as fluffy as my cat. His best scene is in 2.22 when he gets to conduct his own orchestra of penguins! EDIT: corrected ugly apostrophe-mistake, which you might ogle for eternity at Aiko Heiwa's post.

[]:             Quote Post by Aiko Heiwa » Fri Jan 27, 2012 12:42 am robersora wrote: Pen Pen is almost as fluffy as my cat. His best scene is in 2.22 when he get's to conduct his own orchestra of penguins!

[]:             Quote Post by ONIAgent150 » Fri Jan 27, 2012 1:13 am We're all so concerned with human instumentality that we forgot the most dangerous possibility of them all: PENGUIN INSTUMENTALITY.

[]:             Quote Post by Tsuki No Nagisa » Fri Jan 27, 2012 1:20 am ONIAgent150 wrote: We're all so concerned with human instumentality that we forgot the most dangerous possibility of them all: PENGUIN INSTUMENTALITY.

[]:             Quote Post by Aiko Heiwa » Fri Jan 27, 2012 1:29 am ONIAgent150 wrote: We're all so concerned with human instumentality that we forgot the most dangerous possibility of them all: PENGUIN INSTUMENTALITY.

[]:             Quote Post by ONIAgent150 » Fri Jan 27, 2012 2:40 am Rei's Monologue, Translated to Penguin: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Xana » Fri Jan 27, 2012 2:43 am Pen Pen is an alright character, I didn't care much about him until recently. I really hope that one day he will marry a hot penguin girl and own a casino in Vegas. In other words, Pen Pen is awesome.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Fri Jan 27, 2012 8:54 am Go pen pen you say? Then ill just leave these here http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tYFLmKgM5RQ and then http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hDd-ToWplKg

[]:             Quote Post by SAWgunner » Sat Jan 28, 2012 1:07 am ONIAgent150 wrote: Rei's Monologue, Translated to Penguin: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Sat Jan 28, 2012 11:50 am I hate it when I see Misato saying her good-byes to Pen-Pen in Episode 23 (or 24? Definitely in either one. It's been a while) before the Instrumentality Project commences. Not a tear moment, but... what a sad way to see Pen-Pen's final moments. Such a great minor character. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by pat457 » Sun Jan 29, 2012 12:16 am Aiko Heiwa wrote: Little known Eva fact. Pen Pen [s]survived[/s] started Third Impact.

[]:             Quote Post by Ceimoa Nan » Sun Jan 29, 2012 2:12 pm I would give khara millions if they remade Episode 26' with Pen Pen in Rei's place. Picture it. Pen Pen's left wing falls off. Gendo kneels, slowly fusing his hand with Pen Pen's body, lowering it. Close up on Pen Pen's face. "Skwaa!" Pen Pen's body forming a vaginal shape around Gendo's arm, tearing it off and absorbing it, regaining his wing. "Skwaa!" Pen Pen turns around, levitates. "Pen Pen! No! Wait for me, Pen Pen!" "Skwaa!" Pen Pen returns to Lilith. "A.T. Field verified! It's massive!" "Could it be? An Angel?" "No, it isn't! The Angel... is a penguin!" Giant Naked Pen Pen appears. It rises to the clouds, and stares into Eva-01's eyes, driving Shinji insane. Multiple Pen Pens appear standing over the dead bodies of the Nerv personnel. Shigeru cowers as the Pen Pens crowd over his shoulder. One touches him, as he bursts into LCL. Giant Naked Pen Pen absorbs the souls of humanity into vaginal orifices in his wings. Giant Naked Pen Pen's neck tears apart, spewing LCL into space. Giant Naked Pen Pen's body comes apart, falling back to the surface. The final scene; Shinji strangles Asuka, as half of Giant Naked Pen Pen's face watches from the horizon. Rei only appears for a second, poking her head into Misato's kitchen as Shinji and Asuka fight.

[]:             Quote Post by pen-pen » Tue Jan 31, 2012 11:33 pm Tsuki No Nagisa wrote: If that ever happens, it might kinda look like this : notice that(those) big bad-ass pen pen(s)

[]:             Quote Post by Tsuki No Nagisa » Thu Feb 09, 2012 9:52 pm pen-pen wrote: Firstly, I feel honored there's a thread dedicated to me(ha!kidding) Secondly, was kinda focusing my attention at 'Misato's beautifully illustrated ass'...

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Feb 10, 2012 1:06 am This is a must have for every Pen-Pen thread: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/8079/Pen-Pens-Sexuality/

[]:             Quote Post by driftking18594 » Fri Feb 10, 2012 1:48 pm When I saw the title, I thought it was a video of Pen-Pen in a Pokémon game.
